overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character entering a futuristic coffee shop called 'TerraBrew Coffee.' The character walks from a dimly lit covered pedestrian walkway through the entrance into a warmly lit interior with prominent neon signage and modern furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway leading to coffee shop entrance

events.description: character enters the TerraBrew Coffee shop through the glass entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the coffee shop entrance along the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table to the right of the entrance

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'TerraBrew Coffee' text above the entrance
glass doorway entrance with automatic sliding doors
decorative yellow neon lighting strips on the building facade
round tables and chairs outside the coffee shop
exposed industrial piping and machinery along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway toward the TerraBrew Coffee shop entrance. The environment features industrial architecture with exposed pipes, warm yellow neon lighting, and outdoor seating. A person sits at a table to the right as the character approaches the glass entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern coffee shop interior with service counter and neon branding

agents.ego_description: walking through the coffee shop interior toward the service counter at the back

notable_agents.action: person standing near the entrance inside the shop

entered.detail: large illuminated TerraBrew Coffee logo on the interior wall with yellow neon lighting
curved service counter with metallic surface and display cases
digital menu boards showing coffee and dessert options
orange upholstered modern chairs with small round tables
espresso machines and brewing equipment behind the counter

segments.scene_description: Inside the TerraBrew Coffee shop, the character walks past the illuminated wall logo and modern seating area toward the service counter. The interior features warm yellow neon lighting, digital menu displays, and contemporary furniture. The space transitions from the entrance area to the ordering counter at the back of the shop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial walkway into the warm, neon-infused interior of a futuristic coffee shop. It begins by tracking a character along a covered pedestrian path characterized by exposed pipes and yellow neon accents, passing a patron seated at an outdoor table. As the character reaches the glass entrance doors, the scene shifts seamlessly into the shop, moving past an illuminated wall logo and a modern seating area. The perspective then glides deeper into the space, where the lighting remains warm and golden against digital menu displays. Finally, the camera advances through the contemporary furnishings toward the service counter at the back of the establishment.
